reviews.comment:
Me encantó la habilitación! cómoda, ducha de agua caliente y calefaccionada. La atención en la estación muy buena ! volvería sin duda! gracias!

(Translated by Google)
I loved the accommodation! Comfortable, with a hot and heated shower. The service at the station was excellent! I would definitely return! Thank you!

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su calificación y comentario

reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención por parte de la gente que atiende en el full. Me vendieron un lomito de cerdo en el ticket figura lomito de cerdo con queso y venia mucho pan y apenas una fecha que parece más pollo que cerdo la verdad impresentable a parte que te contestan mal al atenderte. No lo recomiendo no paren en esta estación.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the convenience store was terrible. They sold me a pork loin sandwich; the receipt said pork loin with cheese, but it came with a lot of bread and barely any meat, which looked more like chicken than pork. It was truly unacceptable, and they were rude to me. I don't recommend it; don't stop at this station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwMThiNVlREAE
